settings.author_title: Founder & CEO · 100CalSnacks · Goldman Sachs 100 Most Intriguing Entrepreneur
settings.author_bio: 100CalSnacks was built from Tapasya's personal journey through gut health, stress, and five surgeries — and a belief that snacks should work with your biology, not against it. Every article in Snack School is grounded in the same functional ingredient science that informs our formulas.
